library(sf); library(dplyr); library(ggplot2)

fruit <- readr::read_csv("../data/fruitnut_share.csv") %>%
  transmute(county_fips = sprintf("%05d", as.integer(fips)), fruitnut_sale) %>%
  filter(!is.na(fruitnut_sale))

top_fruit <- counties_sf %>%
  inner_join(fruit, by = "county_fips") %>%
  slice_max(fruitnut_sale, n = 18) %>%
  st_centroid() %>%
  mutate(x = st_coordinates(.)[,1], y = st_coordinates(.)[,2]) %>%
  st_drop_geometry()

p_fruit <- p +
  ggimage::geom_emoji(
    data = top_fruit,
    aes(x = x, y = y, size = fruitnut_sale),
    image = "1f34e", alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(0.012, 0.045), guide = "none") +
  labs(caption = paste0(
    "SPMA = DTC/d_FM^2 + intermediated/d_hub^2. ",
    "Markers: 18 highest fruit/nut sales counties (2022 Census of Ag)."
  ))
